Joinder In Dana Companies, Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Siemens Industry, Inc.'s joinder in Dana Companies, LLC's motion to stay or dismiss action on grounds of forum non conveniens is off calendar at Siemens' request. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

MOTION Joinder In Defendant Dana Companies, Llc Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kathryn Huff of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415-433-0990), appearing for defendant / joinder Honeywell International Inc. fka Alliedsignal Inc.
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties David & Se Young Sewell

RULING:
DEFENDANT HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC. FKA ALLIEDSIGNAL INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS ACTION ON THE GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Honeywell International Inc. fka Alliedsignal Inc.'s joinder in Dana Companies, LLC's motion to stay or dismiss action on grounds of forum non conveniens is denied as untimely. Defendant failed to give proper notice required by C.C.P. 1005(b) and 1010.6. The denial is without prejudice to defendant filing its own properly-noticed motion. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Joinder In Defendant Dana Companies, Llcs Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dean Pollack of BURNHAM BROWN (510-835-6705), appearing for defendant / Joinder BorgWarner Morse Tec Inc. as successor-by-merger to Borg-Warner Corporation
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties David & Se Young Sewell

RULING:
DEFENDANT BORGWARNER MORSE TEC INC. AS SUCCESSOR-BY-MERGER TO BORG-WARNER CORPORATION'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS ACTION ON GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS

Hearing held. The Court took defendant BorgWarner Morse TEC Inc. as successor-by-merger to Borg-Warner Corporation's joinder in Dana Companies, LLC's motion to stay or dismiss action on grounds of forum non conveniens under submission. Plaintiffs submitted a proposed order to the Court for consideration and defendant will submit its own version later. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Off Calendar

Joinder In Defendant Union Carbide Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs /opposing parties David Sewell and Se Young Sewell

RULING:
DEFENDANT HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC. FKA ALLIEDSIGNAL INC.'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION, SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO THE BENDIX CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STAY OR DISMISS ACTION ON THE GROUNDS OF FORUM NON CONVENIENS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Honeywell International, Inc., Successor-In-Interest to The Bendix Corporation's joinder in Union Carbide Corporation's motion to stay or dismiss action on the grounds of forum non conveniens is denied as untimely. Honeywell failed to provide proper notice required by C.C.P. 1005(b) and 1010.6. Plaintiffs' objection based on timeliness is sustained. The denial is without prejudice to Honeywell filing its own motion on proper notice. Prevailing party to prepare an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
